summary: Completed frontend testing of ShowSpot (BookMyShow clone) - authentication works but several critical UI/UX issues found with user session management, chatbot functionality, and booking flow navigation

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot toggle button is visible and clickable but dialog does not open - chatbot-dialog element not found in DOM despite z-index fix
Movie cards have overlay interception preventing clicks - div element intercepts pointer events
User session not persisting properly - user gets logged out unexpectedly during navigation
No visible user menu dropdown or profile access when logged in - user icon exists but no menu functionality

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete booking flow due to movie card click interception and session management issues
Profile page not accessible when logged in - redirects or blocks access

passed_tests: User registration via Sign Up tab (controlled inputs working)
User login via Sign In tab (authentication API integration working)
Home page loads with movie grid and navigation
Movies page loads with movie cards and filters

success_percentage.frontend: 40% (auth works, but major UX issues with chatbot, booking flow, and session management)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical frontend issues: 1) Chatbot dialog not rendering despite button clicks 2) Movie card overlay interception preventing navigation to movie details 3) User session management - users getting logged out during navigation 4) Implement user menu/profile access functionality 5) Fix booking flow navigation issues
